scripts.check: pnpm run check:specs && pnpm run check:docs && pnpm run lint && turbo run build check
scripts.check:docs: find README.md docs features -type f \( -name '*.md' -o -name '*.yaml' \) -print0 | xargs -0 perl -ne 'print "$ARGV:$.: trailing whitespace\n" if /[ \t]$/; close ARGV if eof' && ! grep -R -n -E '<<<<<<<|>>>>>>>|=======' README.md docs features
scripts.dev:lab: pnpm --filter @firegrid/runtime run firegrid dev -- pnpm --filter @firegrid/lab dev
scripts.effect:diagnostics: sh -c 'status=0; for f in packages/*/tsconfig.json apps/*/tsconfig.json; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; echo "== $f =="; effect-language-service diagnostics --project "$f" --format text || status=$?; done; exit "$status"'
scripts.arch:reports: pnpm run arch:effect-artifacts && pnpm run graph
scripts.graph: pnpm run graph:overview && pnpm run graph:modules && pnpm run graph:archi && pnpm run graph:mermaid && pnpm run graph:client:mermaid && pnpm run graph:runtime:mermaid && pnpm run graph:substrate:mermaid
scripts.graph:overview: depcruise --exclude '(^|/)(__tests__|dist|build|coverage)(/|$)' packages apps --output-type ddot | dot -T svg > docs/dependency-graph.svg
scripts.graph:modules: depcruise --exclude '(^|/)(__tests__|dist|build|coverage)(/|$)' packages apps --output-type dot --collapse '^(packages|apps)/[^/]+/src/[^/]+' | dot -T svg > docs/dependency-graph-modules.svg
scripts.graph:archi: depcruise --exclude '(^|/)(__tests__|dist|build|coverage)(/|$)' packages apps --output-type archi | dot -T svg > docs/dependency-graph-archi.svg
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run lint:dead && pnpm run lint:dup && pnpm run lint:deps && pnpm run lint:effect-quality && pnpm run lint:effect-rules && pnpm run lint:semgrep:test && pnpm run lint:semgrep && pnpm run test
